name: Five Layer Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (6 oz) Hershey's semi-sweet chocolate chips
1 cup Raisins, chopped dried apricots or miniature marshmallows
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 350°F. Place butter in a 3x9x2-inch baking pan. Heat in the oven until melted; remove pan from oven. Stir together crumbs, cocoa and sugar; sprinkle evenly over butter. Pour sweetened condensed milk evenly over crumb mixture. Sprinkle with chocolate chips and raisins or miniature marshmallows. Sprinkle nuts on top; press down firmly. Bake 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly brown. Cool completely in pan on wire rack. Cover with foil; let stand at room temperature 6 to 8 hours.
